summary: Full testing of Manual Cleanings feature - all 13 backend API tests and 12 frontend E2E tests passed. Feature fully functional including CRUD operations, UI styling (red background, Manual label), edit modal with unit dropdown, and delete functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Manual cleaning rows correctly apply bg-red-50 background (verified: rgb(254, 242, 242))
Unit dropdown in both create and edit modals works correctly using full units list
is_manual flag is automatically set to true on backend when creating manual cleanings
Delete functionality doesn't affect regular cleaning records (verified with test)
passed_tests: Backend: test_list_manual_cleanings_empty - GET /api/manual-cleanings returns list
Backend: test_get_units_for_testing - units available for testing
Backend: test_create_manual_cleaning_success - POST creates with all fields
Backend: test_create_manual_cleaning_minimal - POST works with minimal fields
Backend: test_get_manual_cleaning_after_create - verifies persistence
Backend: test_update_manual_cleaning_success - PUT updates all fields
Backend: test_update_manual_cleaning_change_unit - unit can be changed
Backend: test_delete_manual_cleaning_success - DELETE removes cleaning
Backend: test_delete_manual_cleaning_not_found - 404 for non-existent
Backend: test_update_manual_cleaning_not_found - 404 for non-existent
Backend: test_regular_cleanings_not_affected_by_manual_delete
Backend: test_create_with_cleaner_and_maintenance - assignments work
Backend: test_sorting_by_check_out_date - results sorted
Frontend: Add Manual Cleaning button exists and is clickable
Frontend: Create modal has all required fields (unit dropdown, dates, times, cleaner, maintenance, notes)
Frontend: Creating manual cleaning works and row appears in table
Frontend: Manual cleaning row has bg-red-50 background (rgb(254,242,242))
Frontend: Manual label badge visible with red styling
Frontend: Delete button (trash icon) visible on manual rows
Frontend: Clicking manual row opens edit modal
Frontend: Edit modal has unit dropdown for manual cleanings
Frontend: Edit and save persists changes
Frontend: Delete removes manual cleaning
Frontend: Regular cleaning rows still work correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual Cleanings feature fully tested. Key data-testids: add-manual-cleaning-btn, mc-unit-select, mc-tenant-name-input, mc-checkout-date-input, mc-checkin-date-input, mc-cleaner-select, mc-maintenance-select, mc-notes-input, mc-create-btn, manual-cleaning-row, manual-label, delete-manual-cleaning-btn, hk-edit-unit-select, hk-edit-cleaner-select, hk-edit-maintenance-select, hk-edit-save-btn. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/manual-cleanings, PUT/DELETE /api/manual-cleanings/{id}. Manual cleanings stored in separate MongoDB collection 'manual_cleanings'. UI confirms: rows have bg-red-50 (rgb(254,242,242)) background and red 'Manual' badge.
